# Data Model Checklist: Standardize POI categories across sources

**Purpose**: Ensure entities and fields cover taxonomy versions, mappings, quality metrics, and promotion.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/020-standardize-poi-categories/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Standardization run entity captures run ID, taxonomy version, mapping version, and status.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Standardized POI records store raw categories, canonical categories, and mapping metadata.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Mapping quality metrics capture mapped/unmapped/conflicts by source.
- [x] CHK-DM-004 Promotion outcomes are captured per run.

## Auditability

- [x] CHK-DM-005 Mapping rationale or rule identifier is stored for traceability.
